archetype_reasoning: Initial profile 2026-06-15. Geo trade distribution: 5 contested (0.10-0.80) vs 55 near-certain (>=0.90) out of 87 total geo trades across 15 distinct geo markets. Near-certain dominance (63% of geo trades) is consistent with YIELD_HARVESTER pattern. However, confidence is LOW because: (1) most trades show 'pending' status despite months-old events, suggesting evaluation backlog (likely manual_watchlist pipeline issue); (2) resolved_trades_count=10 is below Pool B minimum of 20 despite 87 geo trades in the system; (3) integration-contract v2.7 flagged this address for research_excluded=1 due to 'single_market_concentration' but current DB shows research_excluded=0 — discrepancy requires Oscar investigation. Assignment based on visible pattern only. Human review required before any use in signal generation.
